mnemonics.title: Four Components of a Computer System
mnemonics.content: **HAOU** - Hardware, Applications, Operating System, Users. Think: 'HAve Our Users' covered the four components of any computer system.

mnemonics.title: OS Dual View
mnemonics.content: **User view = Ease**, **System view = Efficiency**. Users want convenience; the system needs optimal resource allocation.

mnemonics.title: Storage Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: **R**egisters > **C**ache > **M**ain Memory > **S**SD > **D**isk > **T**ape. Remember: 'Really Cool Machines Store Data Tremendously' (fast to slow).

mnemonics.title: Multiprogramming vs Time-Sharing
mnemonics.content: **Multi**programming = switches on I/O wait (maximize CPU use). **Time**-sharing = switches on timer tick (maximize user interaction). Both keep CPU busy but for different reasons.
